rotation.angle: Creative testing, CBO vs ABO, broad targeting, the post-iOS14 signal era
PMax vs Search, match types, negative keyword hygiene, profit-based bidding
Hook rate, thumb-stop, UGC vs studio, the 3-second rule, modular creative
Message match, above-the-fold, friction audits, mobile speed, social proof
Last-click lies, MER vs ROAS, blended metrics, post-purchase surveys, GA4 vs platform
CAC, LTV, payback windows, contribution margin, scaling past the break-even line
Email/SMS flows, repeat-rate, the 2nd-purchase gap, owned vs paid balance

post_rules.hook_lines: 1-2 punchy lines, no fluff, no emoji spam
post_rules.body: short lines, lots of whitespace, one concrete idea, a number or contrarian take
post_rules.cta: soft CTA referencing Zenvora or inviting a reply
